Title: The Conners
Writer: Dave Caplan, Bruce Helford, Bruce Rasmussen
Actors: John Goodman, Laurie Metcalf, Sara Gilbert
Plot: Follow-up to the comedy series Roseanne (1988), centering on the family members of the matriarch after her sudden death.
Awards: Won 1 Primetime Emmy. 5 wins & 22 nominations total
